tools.name: create_instant_room
tools.description: Create a brand-new instant LIQAA video meeting and return shareable join links. End-to-end encrypted, runs in the browser, no install and no account needed. Anyone with the guest link joins with one click. Up to 25 participants on an instant room.

tools.name: list_plans
tools.description: List LIQAA subscription plans with monthly price (DZD) and the maximum participants allowed per meeting.

tools.name: platform_capacity
tools.description: Return LIQAA's load-tested technical capacity and architecture: max participants, real measured load-test results, transport, encryption and latency.

tools.name: platform_stats
tools.description: Return public, aggregate LIQAA usage figures (no personal data): registered users, meetings created, and meetings that actually convened.
